message:
✨ Agent v0.3.1 + UI/UX fixes (#75)

* ✨ Add proper reset dialog with add missing/replace modes

- Create ResetDialog component with two reset options:
  - Add Missing: Keep current cards, add missing defaults
  - Replace All: Reset to only default cards
- Create useDashboardReset shared hook for reset functionality
- Update all dashboards to use the shared reset hook:
  - Clusters, Workloads, Storage, Network
  - Security, Compute, Events, Cost
- Add default cards to Security and Events dashboards
- Replace browser confirm() with proper styled dialog

This provides a consistent reset experience across all
customizable dashboards with clear explanations of each mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add dedicated dashboard pages for nodes, deployments, services, operators, helm, and logs

- Create 6 new dashboard components with appropriate default cards:
  - Nodes: cluster_health, compute_overview, resource_capacity, resource_usage, cluster_metrics
  - Deployments: deployment_status, deployment_progress, deployment_issues, app_status
  - Services: service_status, network_overview, cluster_network, event_stream
  - Operators: operator_status, operator_subscriptions, crd_health, event_stream
  - HelmReleases: helm_release_status, chart_versions, helm_history, helm_values_diff
  - Logs: event_stream, namespace_events, warning_events

- Add routes in App.tsx for /nodes, /deployments, /services, /operators, /helm, /logs
- Update Dashboard.tsx title from dynamic "My Dashboard" to static "Dashboard"
- Add StatsOverview to remaining dashboards (alerts, compliance, compute, cost, events, gitops, security)
- All dashboards include reset functionality via useDashboardReset hook

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add GPU stats, demo markers, alert cleanup, and chart mode toggle

- Add real GPU stats to Compute dashboard using useGPUNodes hook (#11)
- Cluster dashboard already had real GPU stats (#12)
- Add demo indicator to GPU Reservations page (#6)
- Add isDemo flag to alerts and clear demo alerts when mode off (#20)
- Acknowledged alerts already filtered from notifications (#19)
- Add Total/Per Cluster toggle to ClusterMetrics chart (#1)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add Tier 1-2 console enhancements

- Fix behaviors missing in configure dialog (use CARD_BEHAVIORS.default as fallback)
- Add /pods dashboard route with dedicated Pods page
- Add CARD_DEFAULT_WIDTHS for sensible card sizing defaults
- Add 'pods' dashboard type to stats configuration
- Add dashed line overlay to PodHealthTrend chart for better issues visibility
- Enhance token usage animation (lower threshold to 100, increase duration to 2s, add scale effect)

Items completed: #32, #31, #15, #21, #12, #9, #16

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add active users badge and consolidate config dialog

- Add /api/active-users endpoint to track WebSocket connections
- Add GetActiveUsersCount and GetTotalConnectionsCount to Hub
- Create useActiveUsers hook for polling active user count
- Add active users badge to Navbar (shows when any users online)
- Consolidate card configuration to use shared ConfigureCardModal
- Remove duplicate CardConfigModal from Clusters.tsx
- Add default config fields (cluster, namespace, maxItems) for all cards

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add card width/height defaults and clear updates feature

- Add comprehensive INVENTORY.md documenting all 20 dashboards, 60 cards,
  and 85 stats blocks
- Implement proper card width defaults using getDefaultCardWidth() from
  card registry for all dedicated dashboards
- Add gridRow support for card height spanning in all dashboard components
- ClusterResourceTree card now defaults to full-width (12 cols) and
  taller height (5 rows)
- Add ability to clear notification updates on individual feature request
  items in the feedback modal
- Fix TypeScript errors in ClusterMetrics, Deployments, GPUReservations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Enhance ClusterCosts card vendor detection and OpenShift support

- Add OpenShift cost estimator model (ROSA pricing)
- Add known cluster mappings for "prow" as OCI
- Add detection for OpenShift clusters (ocp, rosa, aro)
- Move vendor badge to left side of cluster name
- Persist provider overrides to localStorage
- Add OpenShift to provider cycle when clicking badges

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add vendor logo icons and improve cost badge UX

- Add CloudProviderIcon SVG logos next to text badges in cluster list
- Show server icon, vendor logo, text badge, and cluster name for each cluster
- Add pencil icon on hover to indicate badge is clickable/editable
- Add dashed border to badges to indicate editability
- Move localStorage helpers outside component to prevent re-renders
- Wrap getClusterProvider in useCallback for stability
- Fix useMemo dependencies to prevent infinite refresh loops

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Make cost badge look more clickable with dropdown chevron

- Replace hidden pencil icon with always-visible chevron dropdown indicator
- Remove dashed border (too subtle)
- Add shadow for button-like appearance
- Use brightness change on hover for better feedback

The chevron is a universally recognized UI pattern for dropdowns/selectors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix infinite loop in HelmHistory and useHelmHistory hook

- Remove cachedEntry from useCallback dependency array in useHelmHistory
  (was causing infinite loops as cache updates changed the reference)
- Read cache fresh inside catch block instead of using stale reference
- Add global filter sync for HelmHistory card with proper dependency management
- Exclude selectedCluster from effect deps to prevent setState loops

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Fix Helm History/Values, add API key prompt for Klaude missions

- Fix helm history returning no data by removing invalid -A flag
  (helm history doesn't support all-namespaces flag)
- Pass namespace from release data to helm history/values APIs
- Add loading indication for HelmValuesDiff card
- Add global filter sync for HelmValuesDiff card
- Add API key prompt modal for all Klaude mission cards
- Remove unused Pencil import from ClusterCosts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add offline mode banner and reduce agent polling when disconnected

- Add offline mode banner in Layout.tsx when local agent is unavailable
  - Shows "Switch to Demo Mode" button for easy fallback
  - Mentions to check VPN/network or start kkc-agent
  - Banner positioned to not overlap sidebar

- Reduce agent health polling from 10s to 60s when disconnected
  - Prevents spamming console with connection errors
  - Speeds back up to 10s when agent reconnects

- Add shared agent status checking (isAgentUnavailable)
  - useTokenUsage.ts now uses shared status instead of own tracking
  - useMCP.ts now uses shared status instead of own tracking
  - Prevents redundant failed requests when agent is offline

- Add agent availability checks before WebSocket connections
  - OPAPolicies.tsx checks before creating WebSocket
  - UpgradeStatus.tsx checks before creating WebSocket

- Add @headlessui/react dependency for AgentSelector component

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add backend availability tracking and suppress console noise

- Add BackendUnavailableError class to api.ts with failure tracking
- Skip API requests when backend is known to be unavailable (after 2 failures)
- Retry backend connection every 30 seconds when unavailable
- Update useUsers, useFeatureRequests, useDashboards to silently handle
  BackendUnavailableError
- Suppress recharts dimension warnings in main.tsx (non-critical)
- Remove unused silentFetchClusters function from useMCP.ts
- Remove unused isAgentDemoMode variable from Layout.tsx

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Suppress timeout errors in console when backend unavailable

Add timeout message detection to catch blocks so console doesn't flood
with "Request timeout after 15s" errors when the backend isn't running.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix backend availability tracking - only network failures count

HTTP 500 errors from specific endpoints (like /api/gitops/detect-drift)
were incorrectly marking the backend as unavailable. Now only actual
network failures (timeouts, connection refused) count as backend
unavailability.

Also reduced default timeout from 15s to 5s for faster failure detection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Suppress BackendUnavailableError in Dashboard.tsx

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Don't show 'Failed to fetch clusters' when backend unavailable

When backend is unavailable or requests timeout, don't display error
message in the UI - just silently use demo clusters instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Improve offline banner with brew install command and Settings link

Show helpful installation command and add Setup button linking to
Settings page where users can configure the Claude Code agent API.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add API keys setup reminder to offline banner

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Clarify AI agent API keys in offline banner

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Update offline banner text: Preferences → Setup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Simplify offline banner: 'in settings'

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Rename Setup button to Settings, capitalize 'Settings' in text

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix multiple UI issues in AI Missions and navigation

- Rename "Preferences" to "Settings" in user menu for consistency
- Fix AI missions refresh animation showing when no missions exist
  (initialize agentsLoading to false, set true only when connecting)
- Fix Settings/Demo buttons hidden when AI missions sidebar open
  (add right padding to navbar when sidebar is open)
- Make "Configure API Keys" a proper button that links to settings
  (custom ReactMarkdown link renderer with yellow styling)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix multiple UI issues: Tour overlay, button sizing, and animations

- Tour overlay: Add pointer-events-none to allow clicking floating buttons
  during tour while keeping tooltip interactive
- Diagnose/Repair buttons: Reduce size in PodDrillDown and ClusterDetailModal
  (py-3→py-2, px-4→px-3, shorten labels to just "Diagnose"/"Repair")
- Mission suggestions: Shorten "Diagnose with Klaude" to just "Diagnose"
- Mission suggestions dialog: Close dropdown before starting mission action
- Helm History: Increase early-return timeout from 100ms to 500ms to match
  MIN_SPIN_DURATION for proper refresh animation
- Offline banner: Add right margin when mission sidebar is open

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🎨 Add stethoscope icon to Diagnose button

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix dropdown not closing on Diagnose/Repair click

Add stopPropagation to prevent event bubbling that could re-open dropdown

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix mission suggestions dropdown UX

- Add stethoscope icon to Diagnose button
- Fix dropdown not closing on Diagnose/Repair click (use setTimeout)
- Add click-outside handler to close dropdown
- Add stopPropagation/preventDefault to prevent event bubbling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Add click-outside handler to CardRecommendations dropdown

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix click-outside for dropdown menus

- Move ref to dropdown element instead of container
- Add Escape key handler to close dropdowns
- Use setTimeout to prevent immediate close on open click

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 UI/UX fixes and agent improvements

- Agent: Add version to startup log
- API Key Settings: Click outside to close dialog
- Security Issues: Skeleton loading, refresh button position, sort direction, pagination fix
- Mission Suggestions: Dismiss instead of snooze on action/repair
- Card Recommendations: Dismiss on add, move existing card to first position

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add version to agent banner subtitle

Shows version in the ASCII banner: "KubeStellar Klaude Console - Local Agent v0.3.0"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix gitignore to not exclude cmd/kkc-agent directory

Changed `kkc-agent` to `/kkc-agent` to only ignore the binary at root level

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 UI/UX fixes: GPU gauge units, mission dismiss, demo data tracking

- Remove % symbol from GPU gauges (they show counts, not percentages)
- Mission dismiss: "Minimize" closes chat, trash icon deletes mission
- Add isUsingDemoData tracking to useSecurityIssues hook
- Fix unused import in MissionSidebar

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Agent v0.3.1: Use Opus by default, Haiku for validation

- Default model changed to claude-opus-4-20250514
- API key validation uses cheaper claude-haiku-4-20250514
- Version banner shows in subtitle

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Friendly error messages for API key validation

Show user-friendly error messages with raw error in hover tooltip

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
